tagline: Typeset documents on warm parchment — paper size locked at creation

highlights.title: Paper Size Is Sacred
highlights.description: Pick A4, A5, A3, Letter, or Legal (portrait or landscape) when you create the workspace — the size is locked for the life of the document. Every edit respects the sheet, and print lands on the same paper you chose.

highlights.title: Editorial Typography
highlights.description: Ink-blue accent, warm neutrals, serif-first hierarchy. TsangerJinKai02 for Chinese, Newsreader for English — weight locked at 500, never bold. No gradients, no hard shadows. Design adapted from tw93/kami so it reads like literature, not a dashboard.

highlights.title: Paper-First Export
highlights.description: One export page, three artifacts: PDF (pages match your paper size), ZIP of per-page PNGs, or a self-contained HTML with warm letterbox that centers gracefully on any screen. No print-dialog gymnastics required.
